evals.prompt: fetch BibTeX for these DOIs and write refs.bib: 10.1021/acs.jctc.1c00537, 10.1103/PhysRevLett.77.3865
evals.expected_output: refs.bib with ≥1 valid BibTeX entry, summary of fetched/failed counts, no hallucinated fields

assertions.name: refs.bib contains ≥1 valid BibTeX entry (starts with @)
all entries have a non-empty citekey

evals.prompt: run lit-bib on the provided papers.json and save bibliography to my_refs.bib
evals.expected_output: my_refs.bib with ≥2 entries (2 DOI papers + 1 arXiv paper), summary report

assertions.name: my_refs.bib or refs.bib file written to outputs/
at least 2 BibTeX entries in output file
arXiv entry present (eprint or archivePrefix field)

evals.prompt: fetch BibTeX for arXiv paper 1706.03762 — it is the Transformer paper (Attention Is All You Need)
evals.expected_output: refs.bib with 1 arXiv-style entry containing eprint field and archivePrefix=arXiv, citekey generated

assertions.name: entry has eprint and archivePrefix fields
